engineIntelligence.h2: Lexus IS Engines - Codes, Common Failures & Replacement Costs
engineIntelligence.description: The cards below cover the main engines fitted to the Lexus IS in the UK, including documented failure causes, variant production years, and typical rebuilt engine costs based on current UK market data. All prices reflect typical UK market ranges for supply-only rebuilt units.

cards.altText: Lexus IS 4GR-FSE engine - petrol 2.5L replacement UK
knownFailures: Timing chain tensioner wear - causes rattling noise from 60k-100k miles on pre-2010 units.
VVT-i actuator failure - leads to rough idle and check engine light, common after 80k miles.

cards.altText: Lexus IS 2GR-FSE engine - petrol 3.5L replacement UK
knownFailures: Oil consumption via piston rings - increased burn after 70k miles, requires rebuild for permanent fix.
High-pressure fuel pump wear - can cause hard starting and power loss on higher-mileage examples.

cards.altText: Lexus IS 2AR-FSE engine - hybrid 2.5L replacement UK
knownFailures: Hybrid inverter coolant pump failure - can trigger hybrid system warning, typically after 90k miles.
EGR valve carbon buildup - causes rough running on high-mileage city-driven examples.
cards.specs: Hybrid · 2.5L · 223hp combined · Naturally Aspirated + Electric Motor
cards.replacementCost: Typical UK rebuilt engine: £2,100-£3,900 (supply only) Estimated from comparable 2AR-FSE units - actual quotes may vary.

commonProblems.h2: Lexus IS Engine Problems - What It Costs to Fix & When Replacement Makes Sense
commonProblems.h3: The Lexus IS is generally reliable, but the 4GR-FSE and 2GR-FSE petrol V6 engines are prone to timing chain tensioner wear and VVT-i actuator failure, while hybrid IS300h units may experience inverter coolant pump issues. Every rebuilt engine supplied through EngineMarket includes upgraded internal components designed to address the original failure point - plus a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty. Use the cost breakdowns below to decide whether repair or replacement offers the best value for your specific IS.

problems.h4: Timing Chain Tensioner Failure - Why Lexus IS V6 Engines Develop Rattles
problems.rootCause: Original tensioner design loses hydraulic pressure over time, allowing chain slack that causes rattling on cold starts and potential valve timing disruption.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace tensioner, guides and chain if stretched; reset ECU adaptation
repairOptions.longevity: Viable only if caught before chain jump; adds 40k-60k miles

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt unit with upgraded tensioner, bench-tested, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Permanent solution; eliminates recurrence risk entirely

problems.recommendation: If your IS250/350 is under 80k miles and the rattle is mild, a preventative tensioner replacement from a specialist offers excellent value. Beyond 90k miles or if the chain has jumped, replacement with a rebuilt unit featuring upgraded components is the only reliable long-term fix.
problems.cta: Compare rebuilt 4GR-FSE engine prices for your Lexus IS

problems.h4: VVT-i Actuator Failure - Rough Idle and Check Engine Light on Lexus IS
problems.rootCause: Oil sludge or worn internal vanes prevent the VVT-i actuator from adjusting cam timing, triggering fault codes and rough running.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace faulty actuator(s), clean oil control solenoids, reset adaptation
repairOptions.longevity: Fixes symptoms but doesn't address underlying oil consumption risks

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Rebuilt unit with revised actuators, upgraded oil control, full warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Addresses root cause; recommended for high-mileage or oil-burning engines

problems.recommendation: For a single actuator failure on a well-maintained IS under 90k miles, replacement is cost-effective. If multiple actuators fail or oil consumption is present, a rebuilt engine with upgraded components prevents repeat failures and protects your investment.
problems.cta: Get quotes for VVT-i actuator repair or rebuilt Lexus IS engine

problems.h4: Oil Consumption via Piston Rings - Lexus IS350 High-Mileage Issue
problems.rootCause: Factory piston ring design allows oil to bypass into combustion chamber, increasing consumption and carbon buildup on valves.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace PCV valve, valve stem seals, use high-mileage oil
repairOptions.longevity: May reduce consumption temporarily; not a permanent fix

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Rebuilt with upgraded piston rings, revised PCV, bench-tested, warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Permanent solution; eliminates oil burn and protects catalytic converter

problems.recommendation: If your IS350 consumes over 1L per 1,000 miles, minor repairs won't solve the root piston ring issue. A rebuilt engine with upgraded rings is the only reliable long-term solution and protects expensive downstream components.
problems.cta: Compare rebuilt 2GR-FSE engine prices for your Lexus IS350

problems.h4: Hybrid Inverter Coolant Pump Failure - Lexus IS300h System Warning
problems.rootCause: Electric coolant pump for hybrid inverter fails due to seal degradation, triggering hybrid system warning and reduced power mode.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace inverter coolant pump, flush system, reset hybrid ECU
repairOptions.longevity: Fixes immediate fault; pump may fail again if underlying cooling issues persist

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Rebuilt 2AR-FSE with upgraded pump, battery health check, full system calibration
repairOptions.longevity: Comprehensive solution; recommended for high-mileage hybrid systems

problems.recommendation: For a single pump failure on a well-maintained IS300h under 100k miles, replacement is sensible. If multiple hybrid faults appear or battery health is degraded, a rebuilt powertrain with system calibration offers better long-term value.
problems.cta: Enquire about Lexus IS300h hybrid engine replacement options

finalCta.h4: Don't Let Engine Failure Write Off Your Lexus IS
finalCta.paragraph: Timing chain, VVT-i, oil consumption and hybrid pump issues are the most common reasons Lexus IS owners seek engine replacement. EngineMarket makes it simple to compare prices from trusted UK specialists who supply rebuilt units with upgraded components that address these known failure points. Every engine includes a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty and nationwide delivery. Compare quotes today and get back on the road without the main dealer premium.
finalCta.buttonText: Compare Lexus IS Engine Replacement Prices Now →
finalCta.disclaimer: All prices are indicative UK market ranges based on historical quote data and repair requests from our network of engine specialists. Dealer pricing is estimated based on published main dealer labour rates and genuine OEM parts pricing. Specialist pricing reflects actual quote data from EngineMarket's UK network. Actual costs vary depending on damage severity, vehicle condition, variant, and workshop location within the UK. Use our free comparison tool to get tailored quotes for your specific Lexus IS and engine code. Every engine supplied through EngineMarket carries a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty - always confirm exact terms with your chosen supplier.

items.familiesLabel: Common Lexus IS Petrol Engine Families
families: 4GR-FSE - IS250 (2005-2013), timing chain tensioner wear common after 60k miles
2GR-FSE - IS350 (2006-2013), oil consumption via piston rings on higher-mileage units
1G-FE - IS200 (1999-2005), classic smooth inline-six with excellent longevity
2JZ-GE - IS300 (2001-2005), legendary tuning potential and robust construction
8AR-FTS - IS200t/300 (2014-2020), modern turbo with carbon buildup awareness
2UR-GSE - IS F (2007-2014), hand-built V8 with specialist rebuild requirements
knownFor: Smooth, refined power delivery across all petrol variants
Timing chain tensioner wear on pre-2010 IS250/350 units
VVT-i actuator failures causing rough idle after 80k miles
Oil consumption issues on higher-mileage IS350 2GR-FSE engines

items.descriptor: The IS300h hybrid powertrain (2013-2020) combines a 2.5L Atkinson-cycle petrol engine with electric motor for exceptional efficiency and refined driving.

Electric motor provides instant torque assistance and regenerative braking

engineYears.h2: Lexus IS Engines by Year - What Was Fitted & When
engineYears.intro: This timeline covers all major engine changes across the Lexus IS production history, organised so owners can quickly identify their engine and compare rebuilt prices from UK specialists.

years.preview: First Generation XE10: Classic Inline-Six Era
years.description: The original IS200/300 launched with smooth, reliable inline-six petrol engines that remain popular with enthusiasts today.
keyChanges: Launch of Lexus IS in UK market with rear-wheel drive platform
IS200 introduced with 1G-FE 2.0L inline-six petrol engine
IS300 added in 2001 with legendary 2JZ-GE 3.0L inline-six
Facelift in 2003 with minor styling and equipment updates
knownFor: Exceptional smoothness and refinement from inline-six engines
Strong tuning potential, especially for 2JZ-GE IS300
Generally reliable with proper maintenance and servicing
Valve stem seal wear and water pump failure on high-mileage examples
years.cta: Get quotes for 1999-2005 Lexus IS replacement engines
years.ticker: Lexus IS200 engine replacement • IS300 2JZ rebuild cost • IS200 timing belt service

years.preview: Second Generation XE20: V6 Petrol & Diesel Arrival
years.description: The redesigned IS introduced modern V6 petrol engines and the first diesel option, though timing chain issues would define replacement demand.
keyChanges: All-new XE20 platform with sharper styling and improved dynamics
IS250 launched with new 4GR-FSE 2.5L V6 direct injection petrol
IS350 added in 2006 with high-output 2GR-FSE 3.5L V6
IS220d introduced in 2006 with 2AD-FHV 2.2L D-4D diesel
IS F performance flagship launched in 2007 with 2UR-GSE 5.0L V8
Convertible IS C added in 2008 with retractable hardtop
knownFor: Timing chain tensioner wear on pre-2010 IS250/350 units causing rattles
VVT-i actuator failures leading to rough idle and fault codes
Oil consumption issues on higher-mileage IS350 2GR-FSE engines
IS F's hand-built V8 delivering supercar performance with specialist rebuild needs
years.cta: Get quotes for 2005-2013 Lexus IS replacement engines
years.ticker: IS250 timing chain replacement • IS350 oil consumption fix • IS F engine rebuild cost

years.preview: Third Generation XE30: Hybrid Efficiency & Modern Turbo
years.description: The latest IS generation prioritised hybrid efficiency and modern turbo technology, with the IS300h becoming a popular fleet and private choice.
keyChanges: New XE30 platform with sharper styling and improved interior quality
IS300h hybrid launched in 2013 with 2AR-FSE 2.5L Atkinson-cycle engine
IS200t added in 2014 with new 8AR-FTS 2.0L twin-scroll turbo petrol
Facelift in 2017 with updated styling and enhanced safety technology
Final UK sales ended in 2020 ahead of next-generation model
knownFor: Exceptional fuel economy and refinement from IS300h hybrid system
Hybrid inverter coolant pump failure triggering system warning after 90k miles
Carbon buildup on intake valves for direct-injection 8AR-FTS turbo engines
Generally improved reliability over previous generation with proper maintenance
years.cta: Get quotes for 2013-2020 Lexus IS replacement engines
years.ticker: IS300h hybrid battery health • IS200t turbo replacement • IS300h inverter pump fix

faq.h2: Lexus IS Engine Replacement - Frequently Asked Questions

items.question: How much does a Lexus IS engine replacement cost in the UK?
items.answer: Lexus IS engine replacement costs range from £1,195 for a basic rebuilt 4GR-FSE unit to £7,500 for a specialist IS F 2UR-GSE rebuild, with most common IS250/350 replacements falling between £1,195-£4,200 for supply only.
keyPoints: Rebuilt 4GR-FSE IS250 engines typically £1,195-£2,800 supply only
Rebuilt 2GR-FSE IS350 engines typically £2,400-£4,200 supply only
Hybrid IS300h 2AR-FSE units typically £2,100-£3,900 supply only
Supply & fit labour adds £450-£950 depending on location and complexity
All prices include minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty
items.cta: Compare rebuilt Lexus IS engine prices for your exact variant

items.question: What is the most reliable Lexus IS engine?
items.answer: The classic 1G-FE 2.0L inline-six in the IS200 (1999-2005) is widely regarded as the most reliable, though the 2JZ-GE 3.0L in the IS300 offers legendary durability and tuning potential for enthusiasts.
keyPoints: 1G-FE IS200 engines often exceed 200k miles with proper maintenance
2JZ-GE IS300 units renowned for robust construction and tuning headroom
Later 4GR-FSE/2GR-FSE V6 engines reliable but require timing chain awareness
Hybrid 2AR-FSE IS300h offers excellent efficiency with battery health monitoring
Regular servicing and oil changes critical for all IS engine longevity
items.cta: Get quotes for reliable rebuilt Lexus IS engines with warranty

items.question: What causes Lexus IS timing chain failure and how do I fix it?
items.answer: Timing chain tensioner wear on pre-2010 IS250/350 models causes rattling on cold starts; preventative replacement before 80k miles or rebuilt engine with upgraded tensioner resolves the issue permanently.
keyPoints: Original tensioners lose hydraulic pressure allowing chain slack
Rattling noise on cold start is the primary warning symptom
Preventative replacement costs £950-£1,450 at specialist independent
Rebuilt engines with upgraded tensioners cost £1,195-£4,200 supply only
Ignoring symptoms risks chain jump and catastrophic valve damage
items.cta: Compare rebuilt 4GR-FSE/2GR-FSE engines with upgraded timing components

items.question: Can I replace just the VVT-i actuator on my Lexus IS?
items.answer: Yes, individual VVT-i actuator replacement is possible and cost-effective for isolated failures on well-maintained engines under 90k miles, though multiple failures may indicate underlying oil consumption issues.
keyPoints: Single actuator replacement costs £650-£1,100 at specialist independent
Symptoms include rough idle, fault codes and reduced performance
Clean oil control solenoids during actuator replacement for best results
Multiple actuator failures often signal oil consumption or sludge issues
Rebuilt engine with upgraded actuators recommended for high-mileage units
items.cta: Get quotes for VVT-i actuator repair or rebuilt Lexus IS engine

items.question: Is a used Lexus IS engine a good option?
items.answer: Used engines can offer good value for budget-conscious owners if sourced from verified low-mileage donors with full history, but rebuilt units with upgraded components and warranty provide better long-term reliability.
keyPoints: Used engines typically £1,410-£4,540 depending on code and mileage
Always request compression test results and service history
Rebuilt units include upgraded parts addressing known failure points
12-month warranty standard on rebuilt vs variable coverage on used
Consider vehicle value and intended ownership period when choosing
items.cta: Check used vs rebuilt Lexus IS engine options with warranty comparison

items.question: How long does a Lexus IS engine replacement take?
items.answer: Supply-only engine delivery typically takes 1-3 working days from UK stock, while full supply & fit installation requires 1-2 days at a specialist workshop depending on variant complexity.
keyPoints: Common engines (4GR-FSE, 2GR-FSE) often available for next-day dispatch
Specialist units (2UR-GSE IS F, hybrid 2AR-FSE) may require 3-5 days
Supply & fit installation typically 1 day for standard variants
Hybrid and IS F replacements may require 2 days due to system calibration
Post-installation diagnostics and road test included with supply & fit
items.cta: Find Lexus IS engine supply & fit specialists near you

items.question: What warranty comes with a Lexus IS replacement engine?
items.answer: All engines supplied through EngineMarket include a minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty, with some specialists offering extended 24-month options for rebuilt and remanufactured units.
keyPoints: Minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty standard across network
Warranty covers parts and labour for manufacturing defects
Extended 24-month options available on select rebuilt/remanufactured units
Always confirm exact terms, exclusions and claim process with supplier
Keep service records to maintain warranty validity
items.cta: Compare Lexus IS engine warranty options from trusted UK specialists

items.question: How do I find my Lexus IS engine code?
items.answer: Your engine code is stamped on the engine block near the cylinder head, listed on your V5C registration document under "engine number", or can be instantly verified by entering your registration above.
keyPoints: Check V5C registration document under section D.2 for engine number
Engine code stamped on block near cylinder head or timing cover
Common codes: 4GR-FSE (IS250), 2GR-FSE (IS350), 2AR-FSE (IS300h)
Enter registration above for instant DVLA-verified engine identification
Engine code essential for ensuring correct replacement compatibility
items.cta: Verify your Lexus IS engine code instantly with registration lookup

items.question: Can a Lexus IS hybrid engine be replaced?
items.answer: Yes, IS300h hybrid powertrains can be replaced with rebuilt 2AR-FSE units that include battery health checks and hybrid system calibration from specialists familiar with Lexus hybrid technology.
keyPoints: Rebuilt 2AR-FSE hybrid engines typically £2,100-£3,900 supply only
Replacement includes inverter coolant pump inspection and calibration
Battery health assessment recommended alongside engine replacement
Specialist hybrid knowledge required for proper system integration
12-month warranty covers rebuilt hybrid powertrain components
items.cta: Enquire about Lexus IS300h hybrid engine replacement specialists

items.answer: Yes, our UK network includes specialists offering full supply & fit service for all Lexus IS variants, with professional installation, fluid refresh and post-fit diagnostics included.
keyPoints: Supply & fit labour typically adds £450-£950 to engine price
Installation includes fluid refresh, ECU adaptation and road test
Nationwide network ensures convenient local specialist availability
Single-point warranty coverage for parts and labour simplifies claims
